features.name: User authentication & authorization
features.description: Sign up, login, logout, password reset, role-based access (admin, modeler, viewer)

features.name: Workspace management
features.description: Create, list, rename, delete workspaces. Workspace-level permissions and settings

features.name: Model management
features.description: Create, clone, archive, delete models within a workspace. Model metadata and settings

features.name: Dimensions & hierarchies
features.description: Create named dimensions (lists) with hierarchical parent-child relationships. Support for time, versions, and custom dimensions

features.name: Modules & line items
features.description: Create modules with line items. Each line item has a formula, format, and applies-to dimensions. This is the core data structure

features.name: Formula engine
features.description: Expression parser and evaluator supporting arithmetic, logical, lookup, aggregation, time functions. Anaplan-compatible formula syntax

features.name: Calculation dependency graph
features.description: Automatic dependency tracking between line items. Recalculate only affected cells on change. Circular dependency detection

features.name: Cell-level data storage
features.description: Sparse storage for multidimensional data cubes. Efficient read/write for individual cells and bulk operations

features.name: Time dimension & calendar
features.description: Built-in time dimension with configurable fiscal calendar. Support for weeks, months, quarters, half-years, years. Time aggregation and spread

features.name: Versions (actuals, forecast, budget)
features.description: Version dimension for scenario planning. Switchover between actuals and forecast at configurable time periods

features.name: Grid view (spreadsheet UI)
features.description: High-performance virtualized grid for viewing/editing module data. Row/column pivoting on any dimension. Cell formatting

features.name: Pivot & filter controls
features.description: Drag-and-drop dimension pivoting (rows, columns, pages). Multi-select filtering on dimension members

features.name: Cell editing & input
features.description: Direct cell editing in grid. Support for number, text, boolean, date, list-formatted line items. Input validation

features.name: Module builder (model design UI)
features.description: UI for creating/editing modules and line items. Set formulas, formats, dimensions, summary methods. Blueprint view

features.name: Dashboard builder
features.description: Drag-and-drop dashboard creation. Add grids, charts, KPI cards, text, images. Responsive layout

features.name: Charts & visualizations
features.description: Bar, line, area, pie, waterfall, combo charts. Configurable axes, colors, labels. Chart-grid synchronization

features.name: Dashboard publishing & sharing
features.description: Publish dashboards to end users. View-only mode. Dashboard-level context selectors (filters)

features.name: CSV/Excel import & export
features.description: Import data from CSV/Excel into modules or lists. Export module data and reports to CSV/Excel

features.name: REST API for data integration
features.description: Public API for reading/writing model data, triggering actions, managing metadata. API key authentication

features.name: Actions & processes
features.description: Define import/export actions. Chain actions into processes. Schedule processes or trigger via API

features.name: Real-time collaboration
features.description: Multiple users editing the same module simultaneously. Presence indicators, live cell updates via WebSocket

features.name: Comments & annotations
features.description: Add comments to cells, line items, or modules. @mention users. Comment threads and resolution

features.name: Audit trail & history
features.description: Track all data changes with user, timestamp, old/new values. Revision history for model structure changes

features.name: Scenario comparison
features.description: Compare multiple versions/scenarios side by side. Variance analysis with absolute and percentage differences

features.name: Top-down & bottom-up planning
features.description: Spread values top-down across dimension members (even, proportional, manual). Aggregate bottom-up with configurable summary methods

features.name: Rolling forecasts
features.description: Automatically advance forecast periods. Configurable forecast horizon. Auto-archive past periods to actuals

features.name: What-if analysis
features.description: Create temporary scenarios with modified assumptions. Compare outcomes without affecting live model

features.name: Role-based access control
features.description: Roles: workspace admin, model builder, end user. Granular permissions on models, modules, dashboards. Selective access on dimension members

features.name: SSO / SAML integration
features.description: Enterprise SSO via SAML 2.0 or OIDC. Auto-provisioning of users from identity provider

features.name: Model history & snapshots
features.description: Create named snapshots of entire model state. Restore to any snapshot. Compare snapshots

features.name: Calculation caching
features.description: Cache computed values. Invalidate selectively based on dependency graph. Background recalculation for large models

features.name: Bulk data operations
features.description: Optimized batch read/write for large data volumes. Chunked imports with progress tracking

features.name: Time ranges
features.description: Define model-level and module-level time ranges to limit applies-to scope and calculation volume for different planning horizons

features.name: List subsets and line item subsets
features.description: Support list subsets and line item subsets for dynamic reporting, selective calculations, and reusable dimensional structures

features.name: Selective access and Dynamic Cell Access (DCA)
features.description: Combine role/list-based selective access with read/write driver line items to control visibility and editability at cell level

features.name: UX page types (Board, Worksheet, Report)
features.description: Provide dedicated Board, Worksheet, and Report page experiences with context selectors and linked-card interactions

features.name: Management reporting
features.description: Pixel-perfect reporting pages with narrative text blocks, chart/grid cards, and export-ready layout controls

features.name: Workflow tasks and approvals
features.description: Orchestrate planning cycles with assignees, task status, approvals, and stage-gated collaboration flows

features.name: Application Lifecycle Management (ALM)
features.description: Support dev/test/prod model promotion with revision tags and controlled synchronization of structural changes

features.name: CloudWorks scheduled integrations
features.description: Native scheduled orchestration for imports/exports and cloud connector integrations with retry/status visibility

features.name: Data Orchestrator pipelines
features.description: No-code/low-code data pipeline orchestration for ingestion, transformation, and publishing into planning models

features.name: Transactional and chunked file APIs
features.description: Expose enterprise APIs for chunked file upload/download, import task execution, status polling, and transactional updates

features.name: SCIM user provisioning
features.description: Automated user and group lifecycle provisioning/deprovisioning integrated with enterprise identity providers

features.name: Large model engine profiles (Classic and Polaris-like)
features.description: Engine modes tuned for sparse and high-cardinality models, with guidance for model design and performance boundaries
